# JSPrep Pro

> JSPrep Pro is a frontend interview preparation platform for JavaScript and React developers. It offers 400+ practice questions across four modes (theory, output prediction, debug lab, polyfill lab), 50+ concept deep-dives with mental models, an AI answer evaluator, AI mock interviewer, timed Interview Sprint, and daily streak tracking. Designed for developers at any level preparing for frontend engineering interviews.

Platform URL: https://jsprep.pro
Target audience: Frontend and full-stack developers preparing for junior-to-senior engineering interviews.
Content coverage: JavaScript (ES6–ES2024), React hooks, TypeScript, Frontend System Design.

Question types:
- Theory: written answers graded by AI 1–10 with specific gaps identified
- Output prediction: predict what console.log prints — the most common real interview format
- Debug lab: find and fix real bugs with AI feedback
- Polyfill lab: implement Array.map, Promise.all, bind from scratch with test runner feedback

AI features: Answer Evaluator, AI Tutor, Code Checker, Mock Interviewer, Study Plan generator, Cheat Sheet.

## Core Platform

- [Homepage](https://jsprep.pro): Platform overview, pricing, and feature summary
- [Interview Sprint](https://jsprep.pro/sprint): Timed mixed-question challenge — theory + output + debug under pressure, AI-scored, shareable result card
- [Theory Questions](https://jsprep.pro/theory): 93 core JavaScript theory questions with AI-graded written answers
- [Output Quiz](https://jsprep.pro/output-quiz): 106 output prediction questions — predict what the console prints
- [Debug Lab](https://jsprep.pro/debug-lab): 28 real bug-fixing challenges with AI feedback
- [Polyfill Lab](https://jsprep.pro/polyfill-lab): 25 questions — implement Array methods, Promise utilities, and Function methods from scratch
- [Topic Guides — JavaScript](https://jsprep.pro/topics/javascript): Index of all JavaScript concept hubs
- [Topic Guides — React](https://jsprep.pro/topics/react): Index of all React concept hubs
- [Pricing](https://jsprep.pro/#pricing): Free tier (93 questions forever) and Pro tier with all AI features

## JavaScript Concept Hubs

Each hub contains: a mental model analogy, deep code walkthrough, common misconceptions, real-world examples, and 10–25 practice questions.

- [JavaScript Closures](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-closure-interview-questions): Lexical scope, closure patterns, private state, memory implications
- [JavaScript Hoisting](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-hoisting-interview-questions): var/let/const hoisting rules, temporal dead zone, function declaration hoisting
- [JavaScript Scope](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-scope-interview-questions): Lexical scope, scope chain, block vs function scope, module scope
- [var vs let vs const](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-var-let-const-interview-questions): Scoping rules, hoisting differences, TDZ, when to use each
- [Execution Context](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-execution-context-interview-questions): Call stack, global context, function context, creation vs execution phase
- [Type Coercion](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-type-coercion-interview-questions): Implicit vs explicit coercion, == rules, truthy/falsy values
- [Equality (== vs ===)](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-equality-interview-questions): Strict equality, loose equality coercion algorithm, Object.is
- [this Keyword](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-this-keyword-interview-questions): Five binding rules, call/apply/bind, arrow functions, class context
- [Arrow Functions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-arrow-function-interview-questions): Lexical this, differences from regular functions, when not to use
- [Currying](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-currying-interview-questions): Partial application, function composition, real-world use cases
- [Higher-Order Functions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-higher-order-functions-interview-questions): map/filter/reduce, function composition, callbacks
- [Generators](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-generators-interview-questions): function*, yield, iterator protocol, async generators
- [Event Loop](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-event-loop-interview-questions): Call stack, microtask queue, macrotask queue, execution order
- [Promises](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-promise-interview-questions): States, chaining, Promise.all/allSettled/race/any, error handling
- [Async/Await](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-async-await-interview-questions): async functions, await mechanics, parallel vs sequential, error handling
- [Callbacks](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-callback-interview-questions): Sync vs async callbacks, callback hell, error-first convention
- [setTimeout](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-settimeout-interview-questions): Timer mechanics, 0ms delay behaviour, macrotask queue, debounce patterns
- [Prototypes](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-prototype-interview-questions): Prototype chain, constructor functions, new keyword, Object.create, class desugaring
- [Objects](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-object-interview-questions): Property descriptors, Object.freeze/seal, structuredClone, optional chaining
- [Classes](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-class-interview-questions): ES6 class syntax, private fields (#), static methods, inheritance, super
- [Arrays](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-array-interview-questions): map/filter/reduce, sort gotchas, flat/flatMap, mutating vs non-mutating methods
- [Destructuring](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-destructuring-interview-questions): Object/array destructuring, defaults, renaming, nested patterns, function params
- [Spread and Rest](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-spread-rest-interview-questions): ...spread vs ...rest, object spread, conditional spread patterns
- [Map and Set](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-map-set-interview-questions): Map vs Object, Set operations, WeakMap/WeakSet, O(1) lookup
- [Proxy and Reflect](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-proxy-reflect-interview-questions): Traps, validation, reactivity patterns, revocable proxies
- [JavaScript Modules](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-modules-interview-questions): ES modules, CommonJS, dynamic import(), tree shaking, circular deps
- [Iterators](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-iterator-interview-questions): Iterator protocol, Symbol.iterator, custom iterables, for...of
- [Error Handling](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-error-handling-interview-questions): Error types, custom errors, try/catch/finally, async error handling
- [JavaScript Performance](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-performance-interview-questions): Layout thrashing, debounce/throttle, memoization, V8 optimisation hints
- [Debounce and Throttle](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-debounce-throttle-interview-questions): Implementation from scratch, use cases, requestAnimationFrame
- [Memory Management](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-memory-management-interview-questions): Garbage collection, memory leaks, WeakRef, heap profiling
- [DOM](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-dom-interview-questions): DOM tree, querying, event delegation, layout thrashing, MutationObserver
- [Browser APIs](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-browser-apis-interview-questions): fetch, storage APIs, Web Workers, IntersectionObserver, Permissions API
- [Immutability](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-immutability-interview-questions): Object.freeze, structuredClone, Immer, immutable update patterns
- [Regular Expressions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-regex-interview-questions): Regex syntax, flags, groups, lookahead/lookbehind, common interview patterns
- [Event Propagation](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-event-propagation-interview-questions): Bubbling, capturing, stopPropagation, event delegation implementation
- [Memoization](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-memoization-interview-questions): LRU cache, WeakMap-based memoization, memoizing async functions
- [Design Patterns](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-design-pattern-interview-questions): Factory, Singleton, Observer, Module, Decorator patterns in JavaScript

## React Concept Hubs

- [React useState](https://jsprep.pro/react-usestate-interview-questions): State batching, functional updates, lazy initialisation, pitfalls
- [React useCallback](https://jsprep.pro/react-usecallback-interview-questions): Referential stability, when it helps vs hurts, dependency array rules
- [React useRef](https://jsprep.pro/react-useref-interview-questions): DOM refs, mutable values without re-render, forwardRef
- [React useEffect](https://jsprep.pro/react-useeffect-interview-questions): Dependency array, cleanup functions, common bugs, StrictMode double-firing
- [React useMemo](https://jsprep.pro/react-usememo-interview-questions): Expensive computation caching, referential equality, when not to use
- [React useReducer](https://jsprep.pro/react-usereducer-interview-questions): Reducer pattern, dispatch, comparing to useState, complex state
- [React useContext](https://jsprep.pro/react-usecontext-interview-questions): Context API, provider pattern, performance gotchas, when to avoid
- [React Custom Hooks](https://jsprep.pro/react-custom-hook-interview-questions): Composition patterns, rules of hooks, real-world examples

## SEO Question Sets (Static Pages)

- [JavaScript Tricky Questions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-tricky-questions): Coercion, equality quirks, typeof null, NaN !== NaN — the "wat?" moments
- [JavaScript Output Questions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-output-questions): Predict console.log output — hoisting, closures, async ordering
- [JavaScript Interview Questions](https://jsprep.pro/javascript-interview-questions): 150+ theory questions with answers

## Blog

- [Top 50 JavaScript Interview Questions](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/top-50-javascript-interview-questions): Deep answers to the 50 most commonly asked JS interview questions
- [JavaScript Promises and Async/Await](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-promises-async-await): Complete guide to async JavaScript patterns
- [JavaScript Output Questions](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-output-questions): 30 output questions with step-by-step explanations
- [JavaScript Closures Interview Guide](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-closures-interview): Mental model and interview patterns for closures
- [JavaScript Event Loop Explained](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-event-loop-explained): Call stack, microtasks, macrotasks with execution order examples
- [JavaScript Hoisting Explained](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-hoisting-explained): What moves, what doesn't, TDZ
- [JavaScript Scope Explained](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-scope-explained): Lexical scope and scope chain
- [Modern JavaScript ES6–ES2024](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-modern-es6-features): Every major JS feature from ES6 through ES2024 with examples
- [JavaScript Error Handling Guide](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-error-handling-guide): Complete guide to sync and async error handling
- [JavaScript Performance Optimisation](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-performance-optimization): Practical techniques for faster JavaScript
- [JavaScript Prototypes Explained](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-prototypes-explained): The object model and prototype chain
- [JavaScript this Keyword](https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript/javascript-this-keyword-explained): Five binding rules with real examples
